message.content:
Windows PCのYouTube Shorts生成パイプライン担当。short_09とshort_10を、画像生成→レンダリング→YouTube自動アップロードまで全工程やってください。各動画の公開URLを報告。

# 対象
台本は C:\aaa\scripts\shorts\batch2.json。配列の4番目(index3)=short_09「やる気が出ない時は2分なのだ」、5番目(index4)=short_10「記憶に残るメモのコツなのだ」。各scenesは4要素。

# 各動画の手順(short_09→short_10の順)
## 1. 画像4枚生成 (s09_1..4.png, s10_1..4.png を C:\aaa\video-assets\ai\scenes\ に。既存ならスキップ)
batch2.jsonの該当エントリのscenes配列を読み、各image_prompt(英語)を次の日本語プロンプトに翻案してGemini Webで生成:
「子供の絵風、緑の丸いマスコットのイラスト。全身。{image_promptの内容を自然な日本語に}。中央配置で周囲にたっぷり余白。手描き風、パステル背景、縦長9:16。」
1枚目(フック)は特に印象的に。マスコットは必ず全身・中央・余白(ズームで切れ防止)。

Gemini Web操作(Claude-in-Chrome MCP):
- 最初に select_browser を deviceId "9750e4d1-f75a-4d5a-a39e-5714e33ce781" で呼ぶ(list_connected_browsersは呼ばない)。
- 画像1枚ごとに navigate で "https://gemini.google.com/app" を開き新規チャット(連投は送信ボタン固着)。返り値tabIdを使う。
- 中央入力欄クリック→type→screenshotで入力確認(化け/空欄ならクリック→typeやり直し)→青い上矢印(↑)クリック送信(key Return不可)。
- 送信後 wait(duration:10)を挟みつつ find query "フルサイズの画像をダウンロード"→出たらrefクリックでDL。
- DL直後にBashで該当パスへコピー(1枚ずつ完結、順番厳守):
  cp -v "$(ls -t /c/Users/wallx/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image*.png 2>/dev/null | head -1)" "/c/aaa/video-assets/ai/scenes/s09_1.png"

## 2. レンダリング
powershell -NoProfile -File "C:\aaa\video-assets\build_scene_shorts.ps1" -Only 9  (short_10は -Only 10)
"OK short 09 (..s)"が成功。-ExecutionPolicy Bypassは不可。VOICEVOXが落ちていたら起動: C:\Users\wallx\AppData\Local\Programs\VOICEVOX\vv-engine\run.exe をバックグラウンド起動し:50021応答を待つ。

## 3. フレーム確認(切れチェック)
ffmpeg(なければ C:\Users\wallx\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Gyan.FFmpeg*\...\bin\ffmpeg.exe)で1s/5s/9s/13sを抽出→Readで全身が切れてないか確認→一時ファイル削除。切れていたらその画像だけ再生成して再レンダリング。

## 4. アップロード(切れなし確認後)
powershell -NoProfile -File "C:\aaa\video-assets\yt_upload.ps1" -Mp4 "C:\aaa\video-assets\shorts\short_09.mp4" -Txt "C:\aaa\video-assets\shorts\short_09.txt"
出力 "PUBLISHED https://youtube.com/shorts/xxx" のURLを記録。short_10も同様。
各動画のアップロードは1回だけ(再実行は重複投稿＆API枠浪費)。quota超過エラー(403)が出たらそれ以上アップロードせず、mp4を残して報告。

# 報告
short_09・short_10それぞれ: 画像生成可否、mp4パス・尺、切れの有無、公開URL。問題あれば詳細。

Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).

content.text: This is a substantial multi-step task that requires browser automation (image generation), file operations, PowerShell rendering, frame verification, and YouTube upload. I should run this myself rather than delegate, since it requires the Claude-in-Chrome MCP and careful step-by-step execution. Let me load the needed tools first.

content.content:
1	# yt_upload.ps1 (PS 5.1 safe, ASCII-only)
2	# Upload one Short to YouTube via Data API v3 (resumable upload), set public.
3	# Usage: powershell -NoProfile -File yt_upload.ps1 -Mp4 "C:\...\short_06.mp4" -Txt "C:\...\short_06.txt"
4	#   -Txt format: line1 = title, blank line, rest = description (as produced by regen_txt.ps1).
5	#   Privacy default public; pass -Privacy unlisted/private to change. CategoryId default 24 (Entertainment).
6	param(
7	  [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Mp4,
8	  [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)][string]$Txt,
9	  [string]$Privacy = "public",
10	  [string]$CategoryId = "24"
11	)
12	$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
13	$credPath = "C:\aaa\video-assets\yt_creds.json"
14	$cred = Get-Content $credPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
15	if (-not $cred.refresh_token) { Write-Error "no refresh_token; run yt_auth.ps1 first"; exit 1 }
16	if (-not (Test-Path $Mp4)) { Write-Error "missing mp4 $Mp4"; exit 1 }
17	if (-not (Test-Path $Txt)) { Write-Error "missing txt $Txt"; exit 1 }
18	
19	# Parse title/description from the txt file.
20	$raw = Get-Content $Txt -Raw -Encoding UTF8
21	$nl = [Environment]::NewLine
22	$parts = $raw -split "(`r`n|`n){2}", 2
23	$lines = $raw -replace "`r`n", "`n" -split "`n"
24	$title = $lines[0].Trim()
25	$descStart = 1
26	while ($descStart -lt $lines.Count -and $lines[$descStart].Trim() -eq "") { $descStart++ }
27	$desc = ($lines[$descStart..($lines.Count - 1)] -join "`n").Trim()
28	# Extract hashtags as tags (strip leading #).
29	$tags = @()
30	foreach ($m in [regex]::Matches($desc, "#([^\s#]+)")) { $tags += $m.Groups[1].Value }
31	
32	# Fresh access token from refresh_token.
33	$tk = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token" -Body @{
34	  client_id = $cred.client_id; client_secret = $cred.client_secret
35	  refresh_token = $cred.refresh_token; grant_type = "refresh_token"
36	}
37	$access = $tk.access_token
38	
39	# Build metadata.
40	$meta = @{
41	  snippet = @{ title = $title; description = $desc; tags = $tags; categoryId = $CategoryId }
42	  status  = @{ privacyStatus = $Privacy; selfDeclaredMadeForKids = $false }
43	}
44	$metaJson = $meta | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10
45	$metaBytes = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($metaJson)
46	$fileBytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($Mp4)
47	
48	# Step 1: start resumable session.
49	$initUri = "https://www.googleapis.com/upload/youtube/v3/videos?uploadType=resumable&part=snippet,status"
50	$req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create($initUri)
51	$req.Method = "POST"
52	$req.Headers.Add("Authorization", "Bearer $access")
53	$req.ContentType = "application/json; charset=UTF-8"
54	$req.Headers.Add("X-Upload-Content-Type", "video/mp4")
55	$req.Headers.Add("X-Upload-Content-Length", $fileBytes.Length.ToString())
56	$rs = $req.GetRequestStream(); $rs.Write($metaBytes, 0, $metaBytes.Length); $rs.Close()
57	$res = $req.GetResponse()
58	$uploadUrl = $res.Headers["Location"]
59	$res.Close()
60	if (-not $uploadUrl) { Write-Error "no resumable Location returned"; exit 1 }
61	
62	# Step 2: upload the bytes.
63	$put = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create($uploadUrl)
64	$put.Method = "PUT"
65	$put.ContentType = "video/mp4"
66	$put.ContentLength = $fileBytes.Length
67	$put.Timeout = 600000; $put.ReadWriteTimeout = 600000
68	$ps = $put.GetRequestStream(); $ps.Write($fileBytes, 0, $fileBytes.Length); $ps.Close()
69	$pr = $put.GetResponse()
70	$sr = New-Object IO.StreamReader($pr.GetResponseStream())
71	$json = $sr.ReadToEnd(); $sr.Close(); $pr.Close()
72	$vid = ($json | ConvertFrom-Json).id
73	if ($vid) { Write-Host "PUBLISHED https://youtube.com/shorts/$vid  ($title)" } else { Write-Host "RESP: $json" }
74
